---
title: "Jakub Sobotka"
description: "Toegepaste wiskunde student." 
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<main>
  <section id="hero">
    <div class="hero-name">
      <span>JAKUB</span>
      <span>SOBOTKA<span class="blink" aria-hidden="true">_</span></span>
    </div>
    
    <p class="hero-tag">
      <span class="highlight">TOEGEPASTE WISKUNDE</span> &mdash;
      BOUWEN AAN:
      <span class="highlight">DATA SCIENCE</span>,
      <span class="highlight">MACHINE LEARNING</span>, AND
      <span class="highlight">DUUR SPORT</span>.
    </p>
    
    <div class="hero-meta">
      <span>AMSTERDAM</span>
      <span>HOGESCHOOL VAN AMSTERDAM</span>
      <span>DATA LAB</span>
    </div>
  </section>
</main>
```
